_note: Official FIFA 2026 third-place advancement table. Each entry lists the 8 groups whose 3rd-place team advances to the Round of 32 (advancingGroups), and which 3rd-place team faces each of the 8 group-winner R32 hosts (matchups: 1X -> Y means group X's winner faces group Y's 3rd-place team). 'key' is the sorted-and-joined advancingGroups string, intended for O(1) lookup. 495 entries = C(12, 8).
